title: About
text: This is a crowd-sourced map of places that serve fountain Diet Coke in the broad Santa Barbara area.

title: About
text: This is a crowd-sourced map of places that serve fountain Diet Coke in the broad Santa Barbara area.

title: About
text:
How does it work?

Anyone can submit a location using the submission form
Submissions are reviewed and added to the map
Verified locations have been confirmed by a visitor to actually have fountain Diet Coke
Unverified locations have been submitted but not yet confirmed

title: About
text:
How can I help?

Submit a location you know serves fountain Diet Coke
Verify a location — if you visit a spot on the map, let us know if it checks out!

title: About
text:
Contact
Have questions or feedback? Email us at fountaindcsb@gmail.com or open an issue on GitHub.
